---
name: Bug report
about: Something does not behave as documented
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

Reference the Gherkin scenario or doc that defines the expected behavior, when applicable.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce. Include data shape or schema where relevant — **do not include real photos, location strings, or user identifiers**.

## Environment

- App version / commit:
- Device / OS:
- Backend env (local / dev / prod):

## Notes

Anything else useful — logs (with PII redacted), screenshots (no garden interiors), or related issues.
